items.title: Spurs vs. Thunder.
items.author: NBA
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs vs. Thunder.
For the 12th time this season.
This time in a GAME 7. 🍿

Tonight marks just the 2nd time in the past 30 years that two teams will play each other 12+ times in the same season, joining GSW/HOU in 2024-25.

items.title: Tonight marks just the 2nd time this century that 2 teams will face off for the 12th time in a single season
items.author: ShaiFanClub
items.body_excerpt: Its not uncommon for 2 teams in the same conference to play 4 regular season games and go to 7 games in the playoffs (Sixers and Celtics just did) which would be 11 total games. But because the Spurs and Thunder faced off in the IST as well, game 7 tonight will be the 12th time…
